name: ruyi-github-safe-publish
description: Safely publish local Git projects to GitHub with two-layer secret scanning (135 rules + AI), auto-fix, backup, and optional SEO/CI modules

plugins.name: ruyi-github-safe-publish
plugins.description: End-to-end safe publishing workflow: two-layer desensitization scanning (135 deterministic rules + AI semantic analysis), auto-fix with user confirmation, backup branch, GitHub repo creation, push, and verification. Optional --seo and --ci modules.
